moved_logic_domains: Post action bar rendering and action-button wiring moved from PostCard in ForumRoot to features/feed/components/PostActionBar
detected_risks: PostCard remains a large owner of media/text parsing and should be decomposed in further feed/media phases
Action bar still receives many callbacks from root; next step should move orchestration into feed controller/hooks
notes: No server routes, backend handlers, or db utils were changed.
Button click semantics (fx/reactions/share/report/admin actions) preserved via direct prop wiring.
Hydration-sensitive counters keep HydrateText and suppressHydrationWarning in extracted component.
